column1: # check_dumper_never_blocks manifest — forbidden blocking primitives inside a
# progress_store_tx_lock: the BLOCKING recursive acquire. A dumper must use the
# non-blocking progress_store_tx_trylock() instead. The ERE anchors on the "("
# stage_log_row_count: SELECT COUNT(*) over a stage's *_log (millions of rows)
# under the recursive lock — replaced by the published stage_log_rows counter.
# stage_cursor_count: SELECT COUNT(*) over stage_cursor under the blocking lock —
# from_anchor_target: the old blocking progress_meta read of the from-anchor
# resume target — replaced by refold_from_anchor_target_cached(). Word-anchored
# so it does not match the cached accessor's longer name.
